% C4: HeCBench kernel selection funnel (hardcoded)
% Generated by scripts/generate_latex_figures.py
\begin{tikzpicture}[x=1cm, y=1cm]
\node[font=\small\bfseries, anchor=south] at (2.5,7.50) {HeCBench Kernel Selection Pipeline};
  \fill[pbTealLight, draw=black, line width=0.5pt] (0.00,6.00) rectangle (5.00,6.90);
  \node[font=\footnotesize\bfseries, text=black] at (2.50,6.45) {506};
  \node[font=\scriptsize, anchor=east, align=right, text width=3.0cm] at (-0.10,6.45) {HeCBench total};
  \draw[->, >=stealth, color=pbGray, line width=1pt] (2.50,6.00) -- (2.50,5.40);
  \fill[pbTealLight, draw=black, line width=0.5pt] (0.88,4.50) rectangle (4.12,5.40);
  \node[font=\footnotesize\bfseries, text=black] at (2.50,4.95) {327};
  \node[font=\scriptsize, anchor=east, align=right, text width=3.0cm] at (0.78,4.95) {All 4 API variants};
  \node[font=\scriptsize, anchor=west, color=pbRose, align=left, text width=3.0cm] at (4.22,4.95) {$-$179: missing API variants};
  \draw[->, >=stealth, color=pbGray, line width=1pt] (2.50,4.50) -- (2.50,3.90);
  \fill[pbTeal, draw=black, line width=0.5pt] (0.89,3.00) rectangle (4.11,3.90);
  \node[font=\footnotesize\bfseries, text=white] at (2.50,3.45) {325};
  \node[font=\scriptsize, anchor=east, align=right, text width=3.0cm] at (0.79,3.45) {With Makefiles};
  \node[font=\scriptsize, anchor=west, color=pbRose, align=left, text width=3.0cm] at (4.21,3.45) {$-$2: no Makefile};
  \draw[->, >=stealth, color=pbGray, line width=1pt] (2.50,3.00) -- (2.50,2.40);
  \fill[pbTeal, draw=black, line width=0.5pt] (1.30,1.50) rectangle (3.70,2.40);
  \node[font=\footnotesize\bfseries, text=white] at (2.50,1.95) {242};
  \node[font=\scriptsize, anchor=east, align=right, text width=3.0cm] at (1.20,1.95) {With self-checking};
  \node[font=\scriptsize, anchor=west, color=pbRose, align=left, text width=3.0cm] at (3.80,1.95) {$-$83: no verification};
  \draw[->, >=stealth, color=pbGray, line width=1pt] (2.50,1.50) -- (2.50,0.90);
  \fill[pbTealDark, draw=black, line width=0.5pt] (2.20,0.00) rectangle (2.80,0.90);
  \node[font=\footnotesize\bfseries, text=white] at (2.50,0.45) {60};
  \node[font=\scriptsize, anchor=east, align=right, text width=3.0cm] at (2.10,0.45) {Final selected};
  \node[font=\scriptsize, anchor=west, color=pbRose, align=left, text width=3.0cm] at (2.90,0.45) {$-$182: complexity/deps/diversity};
\end{tikzpicture}
